name: components/command
description: A fast, keyboard-first command palette inspired by VS Code and Spotlight. Provides a complete composition system with Command, CommandDialog, CommandInput, CommandList, CommandEmpty, CommandGroup, CommandItem, CommandSeparator, and CommandShortcut. Supports fuzzy search filtering, grouped results, empty states, dialog overlay presentation, and full arrow-key + Enter navigation. Built on cmdk-solid with ARIA listbox semantics.
useCases: Global command palettes activated by 'Ctrl+K' or 'Cmd+K' for quick page navigation
Action centers where users search and execute app-level commands (e.g., 'Create Invoice')
Settings finders that let users type keywords to jump directly to a specific preference panel
Documentation search overlays combining page titles, headings, and command shortcuts
usage: import { Command, CommandDialog, CommandInput, CommandList, CommandEmpty, CommandGroup, CommandItem, CommandSeparator, CommandShortcut } from "shadcn-solid-components/components/command"
